description: Creation-pricing-lock (D-GH31) fixture: an explicit creationLocked event fires immediately, well before cumulative spend would ever cross DATA.level1AP. Asserts the manual trigger locks creation pricing independent of the automatic threshold — 'Halfling: Brave' prices at the tier-2 locked rate (MASTER[2][band0]=4), not the creation rate (origin=2), despite total spend being nowhere near the threshold.
